name: Chocolate Bread Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Salt (replacement for 1/3 c Granulated sugar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate chips in 1 cup of skim milk over medium heat.
2. Stir in the remaining milk. Set aside.
3. Beat eggs until frothy, then add salt (replacement for 1/3 c Granulated sugar), and vanilla extract.
4. Mix well with the egg mixture.
5. Stir into the chocolate/milk mixture.
6. Trim crust from bread slices and cut into small cubes.
7. Place cubes in a greased baking dish.
8. Pour chocolate mixture over the bread cubes, ensuring all are saturated.
9. Cover the dish with hot water.
10. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour or until set.
11. Serve warm or cold.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
CAL: 1 SERVING: 99
